label: 聚焦子节点
description: 把当前 scene 展开成多个 scene，每个 focus 移到 focus 节点的一个直接子节点。同一棵 tree 共享（不拷贝），仅 focus 不同。是「递归展开协议」的下钻入口——下游展开电池配合 DataTree 批量自动处理每个子节点。
description-en: Expand a scene into a list of scenes, each focused on a child of the current focus. Trees are shared (no copy), only focus differs. The drill-down primitive of the recursive expansion protocol—downstream expander batteries process each child independently via DataTree fanout.
icon: 一个父节点向下分叉指向 N 个子节点，每个子节点上有一个聚焦光标，扁平插画风格，主色2种。

inputs.name: scene
inputs.label: scene
inputs.description: 要展开的 scene；focus 必须指向已存在的节点
inputs.description-en: Scene to expand; focus must point at an existing node.

outputs.name: scenes
outputs.label: 子 scene 列表
outputs.description: 每个直接子节点对应一个 scene，focus 指向该子节点；无子节点时输出空 list
outputs.description-en: One scene per immediate child, with focus on that child; empty list when there are no children.

outputs.name: childCount
outputs.label: 子节点数
outputs.description: focus 节点的直接子节点数量
outputs.description-en: Number of immediate children under focus.
